document.title: Template for a Field Safety Notice Customer Reply Form
document.documentType: Field Safety Notice customer reply form template

sourceSummary.oneLine: Rev 1 July 2018 template for a Field Safety Notice Customer Reply Form.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Used to capture customer acknowledgement of an FSN, confirmation that requested actions were completed, and evidence needed to monitor corrective actions.
keyPoints: FSN information fields include FSN reference number, FSN date, product/device name, product codes, and batch or serial numbers.
Customer details include account number, healthcare organisation name, address, contact name, telephone number, and email.

Customer action options include confirming receipt and understanding of the FSN, performing requested actions, returning or destroying affected devices, reporting no affected devices, or requesting contact.
The form instructs that the organisation's reply is evidence needed to monitor the progress of corrective actions.

entities.name: Healthcare Organisation
entities.evidence: Customer action undertaken on behalf of Healthcare Organisation

entities.name: manufacturer
entities.evidence: FSN Reference number* Pre-filled by manufacturer

concepts.name: Customer Reply Form
concepts.pageTarget: Field Safety Notice Customer Reply Form
concepts.evidence: Template for a Field Safety Notice Customer Reply Form Customer Reply Form

concepts.name: Customer acknowledgement
concepts.evidence: I confirm receipt of the Field Safety Notice and that I read and understood its content.

concepts.name: Affected device return
concepts.evidence: I have returned affected devices - enter number of devices returned and date complete.

concepts.name: Affected device destruction
concepts.evidence: I have destroyed affected devices – enter number destroyed and date complete.

concepts.name: Corrective action monitoring
concepts.evidence: Your organisation's reply is the evidence we need to monitor the progress of the corrective actions.

evidence.claim: The document is a template for a Field Safety Notice Customer Reply Form.
evidence.evidenceText: Template for a Field Safety Notice Customer Reply Form
evidence.pageTarget: Field Safety Notice Customer Reply Form

evidence.claim: The document revision is Rev 1 and the date shown is July 2018.
evidence.pageTarget: Field Safety Notice Customer Reply Form

evidence.claim: The form includes FSN information fields for reference number, date, product/device name, product codes, and batch or serial numbers.
evidence.evidenceText: FSN Reference number* Pre-filled by manufacturer FSN Date* Pre-filled by manufacturer Product/ Device name* Pre-filled by manufacturer Product Code(s) 1 2 3 Batch/Serial Number (s) 1 2 3

evidence.claim: The form includes customer details fields for account number, healthcare organisation, address, contact, telephone, and email.
evidence.evidenceText: Customer Details Account Number Healthcare Organisation Name* Organisation Address* Department/Unit Shipping address if different to above Contact Name* Title or Function Telephone number* Email*

evidence.claim: The customer may confirm receipt of the FSN and that it was read and understood.
evidence.evidenceText: I confirm receipt of the Field Safety Notice and that I read and understood its content.

evidence.claim: The customer may confirm all actions requested by the FSN were performed.
evidence.evidenceText: I performed all actions requested by the FSN.

evidence.claim: The form captures whether information and required actions were brought to relevant users and executed.
evidence.evidenceText: The information and required actions have been brought to the attention of all relevant users and executed.

evidence.claim: The form can record returned affected devices with quantity, lot or serial number, and return date.
evidence.evidenceText: I have returned affected devices - enter number of devices returned and date complete. Qty: Lot/Serial Number: Date Returned (DD/MM/YY):

evidence.claim: The form can record destroyed affected devices with number destroyed and completion date.
evidence.evidenceText: I have destroyed affected devices – enter number destroyed and date complete.

evidence.claim: The customer reply is evidence used to monitor the progress of corrective actions.
evidence.evidenceText: Your organisation's reply is the evidence we need to monitor the progress of the corrective actions.

reviewFlags.reason: No actual product model or device name is present; product fields are placeholders marked pre-filled by manufacturer.
No authority or jurisdiction is stated in the source text, although source metadata includes authoritySignal MFDS/domestic.
No standard is identified in the source text.
No actual manufacturer name is present; the document uses LOGO/COMPANY NAME and manufacturer/sender/requester placeholders.
